description_long: This is a small, realistic crab with a robust, rounded carapace and two prominent claws, one of which is significantly larger than the other. The carapace is dark brown with subtle mottling, while the underside and joints of the legs are lighter, almost beige. The crab has eight slender, jointed walking legs, each ending in a pointed tip, and two large chelae (claws) with visible texture and color variation. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a wide field of view. The surface of the crab appears hard and slightly rough, with a matte to semi-glossy finish typical of exoskeletons. This crustacean would be found in urban food markets or as a decorative or discarded item in urban environments.
description: A small, dark brown crab with one oversized claw, eight slender legs, and a hard, textured shell. The eyes are on short stalks and the underside is lighter in color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both claws (with the left claw larger), and all eight legs splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large left claw raised above the body and the slender profile of the crab.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the lighter underside, both claws, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the large right claw prominent and the crab's body profile visible.
